zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Marguerite de Picquigny於1316年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆阿米安斯時，她的父親Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny44歲，母親Marguerite deFluy42歲。她於1342年11月20日與Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年在法國皮卡迪索姆艾利勒-豪吉可洛黑享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Marguerite de Picquigny于1316年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆阿米安斯时，她的父亲Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny44岁，母亲Marguerite deFluy42岁。她于1342年11月20日与Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年在法国皮卡迪索姆艾利勒-豪吉可洛黑享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Marguerite de Picquigny was born in 1316, in Amiens, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny, was 44 and her mother, Marguerite deFluy, was 42. She married Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher on 20 November 1342. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1367, in Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Marguerite de Picquigny est née en 1316, à Amiens, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Marguerite deFluy, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher le 20 novembre 1342. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1367, à Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Marguerite de Picquigny 1316 in Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny 44 und ihre Mutter Marguerite deFluy 42. Sie hat am 20. November 1342 Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1367 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Marguerite de Picquigny è nata il nel 1316 nel Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Marguerite deFluy, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher il 20 novembre 1342. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1367, nel Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite de Picquignyが1316年にフランスピカーディソンメアミエンスで生まれた時，父Seigneur Renauld de Picquignyは44歳，母Marguerite deFluyは42歳であった。1342年11月20日にRobert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年にフランスピカーディソンメエイリ-レ-ハウト-クロチャーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Marguerite de Picquigny(이)가 1316년 프랑스 피카디 솜 아미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite deFluy(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1342년 11월 20일 Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 프랑스 피카디 솜 아이리-레-하트-c럭어에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Marguerite de Picquigny nasceu em 1316, em Amiens, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite deFluy, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher em 20 de novembro de 1342. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1367, em Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Marguerite de Picquigny родилась в 1316 г. в местности амиенс, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite deFluy, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher 20 ноября 1342 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1367 г. в местности эилли-ле-хаут-клочир, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Marguerite de Picquigny nació en 1316, en Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Marguerite deFluy, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Robert III d'Ailly le Haut Clocher el 20 de noviembre de 1342. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1367, en Ailly-le-Haut-Clocher, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
